summary: Phase 32 AI Spiritual Coach (Sage) testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with all features working: mode selection (5 modes), session management, chat interface, and AI responses.
seed_data_creation: Test coach sessions created during testing (various modes: spiritual, life, shadow, manifestation, healing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 32 Sage AI Coach fully functional. GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key working. Chat responses take 10-30 seconds. Sessions stored in MongoDB coach_sessions collection. All 5 coaching modes working.

GET /api/coach/modes.returns: 5 modes: spiritual, life, shadow, manifestation, healing with id, name, color, desc

GET /api/coach/sessions (auth).returns: sessions array with id, mode, message_count, preview, created_at, updated_at

GET /api/coach/sessions/{id} (auth).returns: session with id, mode, messages array, created_at, updated_at

multi_turn_conversation.description: Multiple messages to same session are stored and retrieved correctly

frontend_coach_page.unauthenticated: Shows 'Sign in to speak with Sage' message

authenticated.session_list: Shows New Conversation button and existing sessions with mode, message count, preview
authenticated.mode_selection: 5 mode cards: Spiritual Guidance, Life Coaching, Shadow Work, Manifestation, Healing Guide
authenticated.chat_interface: Chat messages container, input field, send button, back to conversations link
authenticated.message_bubbles: User messages on right, coach responses on left with timestamps

navigation.primary_nav: 'Sage' link present in primary navigation bar (path: /coach, icon: MessageCircle)

regression_tests.GET /api/cosmic-calendar/today: 200 OK - returns date, numerology, moon, mayan, cardology

pages_tested: /coach (unauthenticated) - Shows Sage title, 'Sign in to speak with Sage' message
/coach (authenticated) - New Conversation button, session list with previews
/coach mode selection - 5 mode cards with names and descriptions
/coach chat interface - Messages container, input field, send button
/coach chat with messages - User bubble, coach response bubble with AI-generated content
frontend_tests_summary.navigation_verified: 'Sage' in primary nav bar with MessageCircle icon
